deck: ~27 cards — Neutralize+, Survivor+, Backstab, Blade Dance+, Cloak and Dagger+ x2, Escape Plan, Sucker Punch+, Slice, Masterful Stab, All-Out Attack, Dagger Spray, Dash, Bouncing Flask, Crippling Cloud, Noxious Fumes+, Catalyst+, Footwork, A Thousand Cuts, Envenom, Tools of the Trade, Piercing Wail, Bullet Time, Deflect x2, Defend+, Strike x2, Defend x2 + 5x Apparition (Ethereal from Council of Ghosts)
relics: Ring of the Snake, Pocketwatch, Hovering Kite (Act 1 boss), Akabeko, Strike Dummy, The Boot, Mummified Hand, others
cause_of_death: Gremlin Leader elite at Floor 29. Entered at 4 HP / 29 Max HP (14%) after brutal combat sequence with no rest sites. Rally scaled to +9 Str by turn 6. All 5 Apparitions exhausted by turn 5. Turn 6: 28 incoming vs 20 block (Block Potion 12 + Piercing Wail -6 Str + Fear Potion -3 Str + Survivor 8) at 4 HP. 8 unblocked = lethal.
key_moments: **Poison engine carried the run.** Noxious Fumes+ (3 poison/turn) + Bouncing Flask (9 poison) + Catalyst+ (triple) defeated Lagavulin (elite), Slime Boss (boss), Spheric Guardian (hallway), Snecko (hallway), first Gremlin Leader (elite at F23, killed in 7 turns with ATC), Book of Stabbing (hallway), and Cultist+Chosen. Poison bypassed Spheric Guardian's Barricade block.

**Hovering Kite + Tools of the Trade + Tactician+ = 6E/turn engine.** TotT discards Tactician+ at turn start: Kite (+1E) + Tactician+ (+2E) = 6E base. Combined with card filtering from TotT, this was the best energy engine observed for Silent.

**Council of Ghosts Apparitions (5 Intangible cards) accepted at 12 HP / 58 Max HP**, reducing to 29 Max HP. Player correctly reasoned that Intangible + poison synergy outweighed 29 raw HP. Apparitions were critical for surviving Snecko (3 Intangible turns at 12 HP) and Cultist+Chosen (5 Intangible turns, killed both with poison+Catalyst+).

**Map forced a death spiral sequence**: F24 Monster (Spheric Guardian drained 50->12) -> F25 Rest (12->25) -> F26 Unknown (non-combat) -> F27 Unknown (non-combat) -> F28 Monster (Cultist+Chosen, survived at 15 HP via all 5 Apparitions) -> F29 Elite (Gremlin Leader at 4 HP). Only 1 rest site across 6 floors with 3 combats. At 29 Max HP, no recovery path existed.

**First Gremlin Leader (F23) killed cleanly** at 59/69 HP -- ATC dealt 5-8 passive damage per turn to all enemies, Shivs + Envenom applied poison, Fight won in 7 turns. The deck was strong enough; the HP was not.

**Second Gremlin Leader (F29) was unwinnable at 4 HP**: Even with Apparitions covering turns 1-5, Rally had stacked +9 Str by turn 6. Piercing Wail (-6 Str) + Fear Potion (-3 Str) reduced Leader's Stab to 20, but with a gremlin attack the combined incoming was 28 vs 20 max block.
lessons: **Poison engine (Noxious Fumes+ + Bouncing Flask + Catalyst+) is a confirmed strong Silent archetype** -- carried through 6+ hard fights including Spheric Guardian (poison bypasses Barricade), Snecko (poison under Confusion), and Book of Stabbing (poison ignores Wounds). Approaches viability as a 5th winning formula when combined with Apparitions and energy engine.

**Apparitions + poison is an excellent synergy**: 5 Intangible turns buy guaranteed poison scaling time. But Apparitions are finite -- once exhausted, the deck must survive on block alone, and at reduced Max HP
**Hovering Kite + Tools of the Trade is the best Silent energy + filtering combo observed.** Adding Tactician+ creates 6E turns. Created hovering-kite.md.

**Rest site density across a path determines survivability at low Max HP.** The path from F25 to F29 had 1 rest site across 5 floors, 3 of which were combat. At 29 Max HP, this was a guaranteed death spiral. Added rest site density evaluation to strategy.md map pathing.
**Accepting Apparitions at 12 HP was correct** -- the 5 Intangible turns carried 2 otherwise-lethal fights. The death was caused by map structure, not by the Apparition decision.
